{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032220055792F90BA769CBC3582B16"}"},"total":1072},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7585152505209078553","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的一本书，两界倒腾物资的立足点现在来说不算特色。不过拿添加剂去毒害异世界的观点观点还是很新奇的，尤其是这东西对他们是增益！
当然，最主要是幽默风趣的文笔，似乎是把搞笑融入骨子！期待更强的主角，更多的精彩，更多的预制菜，以及后续对异世界和主世界的影响！","text_exts":[{"e":111,"s":108,"text":"预制菜","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%A2%84%E5%88%B6%E8%8F%9C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774181157C3582B16%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227585152505209078553%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227569646080103549976%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%A2%84%E5%88%B6%E8%8F%9C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766059791,"group_id":"7569646080103549976","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyjIrzwZrnrX14qQUpVrthQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"754700642953723","user_name":"我在番茄试毒成神"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"754700642953723","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7569646080103549976","book_info":{"abstract":"意外拥有可以穿梭古今的厨房，可不会做菜怎么办？
没事！
咱邪修开店靠的全是科技与狠活！
打开冰箱，拿出剪刀，剪开包装，倒入碗碟放进微波炉，解冻三十秒，加热三分钟。
叮！客官，您的宫保鸡丁好了。
什么？来碗鸡汤？
好嘞！我一勺浓缩鸡汤宝，加水熬煮。
鸡汤来咯~~~
什么？你说菜不够香？
我一滴满街飘香油
满城飘香！
本以为吃惯了原生态绿色食物的古人会看不上这些垃圾食品。
哪曾想，鱼治的酒楼却越开越红火，甚至还吃出了预制菜的隐藏属性。
小葱拌豆腐能美白（豆腐里面加了工业漂白剂）
玉米火腿肠炒蛋能抗衰老（火腿肠防腐剂加多了）
淀粉肠能强健骨骼，武林人士的最爱（骨泥增钙）
.......
如此这般的好处更是引得无数王侯将相、武林人士趋之若鹜。
可鱼治却是越开越心惊。
求求你们可别吃了，我家预制菜可全是科技与狠活呀！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fd74dcf7c2efeb047fccf92b8c8433b5","author":"本本猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7569646080103549976","book_name":"混在古代搞餐饮，全是科技与狠活","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"11.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7569646487638901272","read_count":"111636","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"589513"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"284","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,穿越,美食,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ec3e6e3a322e22f2ba1ef5296a2ca1cd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365157&x-signature=aW2y9usMBE56dANnp4mcwjzrpFo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3500459994394483","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"103"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032220055792F90BA769CBC3582B16"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":114,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5015,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":22124,"reply_count":14,"show_pv":60667},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_au 男主设定：⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
情节内容：⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
作者文笔：⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
